final:
// // Asynchronous reset sets output to HIGH on clock edge
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input d,
  input r,
  output reg q
);always @(posedge clk or posedge r) begin
    if (r) begin
      q <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
      q <= d;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset sets output to HIGH on clock edge
